title: Jessica Cytryn
content:
People.ContactEmail jcytryn@mccarthy.ca
Jessica is a regulatory lawyer in the firm’s Business Law Group. Drawing on over a decade working in food, beverage, and hospitality, she provides practical, strategic, and common-sense advice across a wide range of regulatory and compliance matters.
She works with businesses operating in Canada and Québec at every stage of their growth and operations, from early strategic planning and market entry to ongoing regulatory compliance, obtaining permits and licences, and responding to regulatory inquiries and enforcement actions. Leveraging her experience as a transactional lawyer, Jessica regularly provides subject-matter expertise on regulatory and compliance issues arising in transactions and disputes across a range of industries such as retail, consumer products, food and beverage, hospitality, and products subject to specialized regulatory regimes.

#### Jessica’s experience includes representing:
- Vision Ridge Partners in its acquisition of Vegpro International, one of the largest vegetable producers in Canada
- Unilever in the demerger of its ice cream business, The Magnum Ice Cream Company
- General Mills in the sale of its North American yogurt business to Lactalis and Sodiaal
- PepsiCo. in its sale of Tropicana, Naked and other select juice brands to PAI Partners
- Sagard Private Equity Canada in its investment in Courchesne Larose, a leader in the Canadian fresh fruit and vegetable industry
- Goodfood Market before the Quebec alcohol board to successfully obtain authorization to deliver alcohol from its online-only grocery stores
- Kruger Inc. and Fonds de solidarité des travailleurs du Québec in the sale of their interests in alcoholic beverage company Station 22 to The Dandurand Group
- Olymel in its sale to Genus PIC of all intellectual property in their porcine genetics
Jessica is also involved in her community; she is an advisor to La Tablée des Chefs , a national organization fighting against food insecurity, and was a founding member and President of the Montreal Restaurant Workers Relief Fund.
- Groupe Snef Makes Strategic Investment in Norda Stelo May 4, 2026
- Imperial Building Products Ltd. completes agreement to be acquired by CGC Inc. September 1, 2025
- TAPCO acquires Logix ITS August 25, 2025
- Ares Management LLC and Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec co-invest in Synex Business Performance April 3, 2025
- General Mills sells North American yogurt business to Lactalis and Sodiaal for US$2.1B January 27, 2025
- Enercare acquires all issued and outstanding units of HydroSolution September 12, 2022
- Blog Post Driving Forward: Key Takeaways From the 16th Anniversary Edition of McCarthy Tétrault’s Annual Retail and Consumer Markets Summit March 2, 2026
- Publication Cross-Border: A Retailer’s Guide to Doing Business in Canada February 28, 2025
- Publication Cross-Border: A Consumer Products Industry Guide to Doing Business in Canada February 27, 2025
- Blog Post Publication of final business Regulation governing Quebec French language: one step forward and two steps back? July 9, 2024
- Publication Doing Business in Canada 2023 November 9, 2023
- Speaking Engagement Canadian Association for Food Law and Policy – 6th Annual Conference November 10, 2022
